aispm.title: Vertex AI Claude 3 Haiku shutdown scheduled **August 23, 2026**
aispm.description: identify all deployments and plan migration

aispm.title: Vertex AI Claude 3.5 Haiku shutdown scheduled **July 5, 2026**
aispm.description: earlier deadline than Claude 3 Haiku

aispm.title: Vertex AI Explainable AI deprecated (March 16, 2026)
aispm.description: flag workflows still using this service

aispm.title: Vertex AI Veo video generation preview endpoints deprecated
aispm.description: must migrate by **April 2, 2026**

findings.title: Vertex AI Claude 3 Haiku shutdown scheduled **August 23, 2026**
findings.description: identify all deployments and plan migration

findings.title: Vertex AI Claude 3.5 Haiku shutdown scheduled **July 5, 2026**
findings.description: earlier deadline than Claude 3 Haiku

findings.title: Vertex AI Explainable AI deprecated (March 16, 2026)
findings.description: flag workflows still using this service

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot (M365)
details: Microsoft Graph API Changelog: Bicep infrastructure-as-code support added for User, Application, servicePrincipal, OAuth2PermissionGrant, appRoleAssignment, Group resources. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/

Lifecycle Workflows workflow creation limit raised from 50 to 100. New resources: attributeChangeTrigger, groupBasedSubjectSet, membershipChangeTrigger, insights. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
Event Hubs change notifications will retire SAS authentication — migrate to Entra ID RBAC. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
New agentSignIn resource with agentType enumeration for identity blueprint principals. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
New selfServiceSignUp, signUpIdentity, signUpStatus resources for external ID tracking. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
17 new protocol type members added (implicit flows, authorization code variants, client credentials, Kerberos, SSO, OBO). Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
details: March 2026: Work IQ tools (Preview) — connects Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents to Work IQ service for real-time insights from M365 files, emails, meetings, and chats. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot-studio/whats-new

February 2026 expanded: Claude Opus 4.6 added as model option. Prompt builder now supports content moderation sensitivity controls (hate/fairness, sexual, violence, self-harm). Inline editing of prompt instructions in agent tool details view. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot-studio/whats-new

platforms.name: Power Apps
details: Studio/Mobile version 3.26034 now in Preview US region. Version 3.26033 broadly deployed to Canada, India, South America, Japan, APAC, Australia, UK, Europe. Version 3.26032 now in US and GCC. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-platform/released-versions/powerapps

platforms.name: ChatGPT Enterprise (OpenAI)
details: OpenAI Community Forum: GPT-5.4-nano Priority Service Tier experiencing inconsistent latency. Source: https://community.openai.com
MCP connector refreshing tokens on every tool call without session persistence. Source: https://community.openai.com
Codex severe performance degradation with multiple files. Source: https://community.openai.com
Platform logs not being deleted after 30 days as expected. Source: https://community.openai.com
Fine-tuning operations stuck in "Waiting" status. Source: https://community.openai.com
ChatGPT Apps enabled but not visible in UI dropdown. Source: https://community.openai.com

platforms.name: Claude Enterprise (Anthropic)
details: API Docs: Models API now returns capabilities object per model for programmatic feature discovery. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started
Response headers documented: request-id and anthropic-organization-id returned in every response. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started
Files API expanded: GET /v1/files endpoint added. Skills API expanded: GET /v1/skills endpoint added. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started
Third-party platform size limits documented: Vertex AI 30 MB, Amazon Bedrock 20 MB. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started
Build with Claude Docs: Full feature availability classification documented (Beta, GA, Deprecated, Retired). Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/build-with-claude/overview
Structured outputs availability now explicitly excludes Vertex AI. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/build-with-claude/overview

platforms.name: Amazon Q
details: Q Developer Doc History: Full detailed changelog now captured with 60+ entries. Notable: Context hooks deprecated, remote MCP servers with OAuth, Q CLI v1.16.0 features, enhanced context management. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qdeveloper-ug/doc-history.html
Q Business Doc History: Full detailed changelog captured with precise dates for all entries. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qbusiness-ug/doc-history.html

platforms.name: Amazon Bedrock
details: Six new open-weight models: DeepSeek V3.2, MiniMax M2.1, GLM 4.7, GLM 4.7 Flash, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3 Coder Next. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/what-is-bedrock.html
OpenAI-Compatible Projects API now supported in Mantle inference engine. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/what-is-bedrock.html

Server-Side Tools Support — AgentCore Gateway tools integrate with Bedrock models via Responses API without client-side orchestration. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/what-is-bedrock.html
Claude Opus 4 deprecation warning: migrate to Claude Opus 4.1 before May 31, 2026. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/doc-history.html

platforms.name: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
details: Google ADK and OpenAI Agents SDK now listed as supported frameworks (alongside CrewAI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Strands Agents). Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html
Gateway integrations now list Salesforce, Zoom, JIRA, Slack as supported third-party tools. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html
Browser service now supports Playwright and BrowserUse integrations. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html
Policy service supports both natural language and Cedar (AWS open-source policy language). Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html

Evaluations service integrates with CloudWatch and requires OpenTelemetry/OpenInference instrumentation. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html
AgentCore Doc History: No new entries since December 2, 2025. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/doc-history.html

platforms.name: Google Vertex AI
details: Claude 3.5 Haiku deprecation added — shutdown July 5, 2026. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Gemini 3.1 Pro, 3.1 Flash Image, and Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio model releases. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Agent Engine expansion: Code Execution, bidirectional streaming, Memory Bank features. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Veo 3.1 video generation with extended aspect ratios, 4K upsampling, advanced editing. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Evaluation service now supports Anthropic and Llama partner models. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Workbench: JupyterLab 4+ support, managed credentials, Confidential Computing, Gemini CLI. Source: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes

platforms.name: Cursor
details: v2.6 (Mar 19, 2026): Automatic stale code cleanup after each turn. Dynamic instrumentation logging. Plan file content in autocomplete. Image galleries. Multiline Plan mode questions. Source: https://cursor.com/changelog
Enhanced agent workflows, improved PR/review anchoring, smoother tool-use flows, more reliable MCP setup. Source: https://cursor.com/changelog
Clearer team/enterprise access controls. Enhanced Slack integration. Improved long-running session reliability. Source: https://cursor.com/changelog
Bug fixes: plan editor web link fixes, branch/PR status refresh, diverged branch blocker, MCP dialog stability, Debug mode port conflict resolution. Source: https://cursor.com/changelog
Documentation expanded to 200+ entries covering CLI tools, language-specific setups, Figma integration, test generation. Source: https://docs.cursor.com

platforms.name: Windsurf
details: v1.9577.43 (Mar 19): Fixed Mac x64 build issues. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
v1.9577.42 (Mar 19): Stability and performance enhancements. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
GPT-5.4 Mini (Mar 17): Now available at 1x credits with promotional pricing. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
v1.9577.27 (Mar 12): Fixed Apple M5 processor compatibility. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
v1.9577.24 expanded details: Diff Zone fixes, AGENTS.md fix, improved SSH/Remote performance. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
Deprecated features: Windsurf Browser (deprecated Sep 2025), Knowledge Base removed, Legacy Mode removed. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog

platforms.name: Perplexity
details: Agent API now described with "model behavior controls". Embeddings API includes "retrieval workflow guides". Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/changelog
MCP Server tools enumerated: perplexity_search, perplexity_ask, perplexity_research, perplexity_reason. Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/changelog
API key rotation recommendation: every 30-90 days. Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/changelog
API Reference: /v1/agent endpoint confirmed (migration from /v1/chat/completions). Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference
Model fallback chains documented (up to 5 models). Presets: "fast-search", "pro-search", "deep-research". Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference
New parameters: instructions (custom system instructions), research_loop_steps (1-10). Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference

platforms.name: Dia Browser
details: v1.23.0 (Mar 19, Issue #17): GitHub Live Tab Groups — PR Status Celebrations animations, Automatic Cleanup on PR merge, Recently Completed PR Preview (hover to restore), enhanced navigation animations. Source: https://diabrowser.com/release-notes

v1.22.0 (Issue #16, Mar 11) expanded: Proactive Suggestions AI-curated, performance fixes (sluggishness/memory leaks), profile switching shortcuts (Ctrl+1,2,3), Command Bar routing to Chat and Google Search. Source: https://diabrowser.com/release-notes

Security page updated: Independent security firm assessment detailed (code reviews, architecture analysis, exploit testing). AI data retention policy clarified — never used for training. Prompt injection safeguard note: some attacks can cause unexpected style/tone shifts without compromising system security. Source: https://diabrowser.com/security

aidr.title: Microsoft Graph agentSignIn resource
aidr.description: New agentType enumeration enables tracking of agent identity principals — Zenity must update Activity monitoring to detect and classify agent-type sign-ins vs human sign-ins

aidr.title: Copilot Studio Work IQ tools (Preview)
aidr.description: Agents can now access real-time M365 files, emails, meetings, and chats — creates new data exfiltration vectors through agent-accessible work context. Data Lens must monitor Work IQ tool invocations

aidr.title: Amazon Bedrock Server-Side Tools
aidr.description: AgentCore Gateway tools execute server-side without client orchestration — Activity monitoring loses client-side visibility into tool execution. Must adapt detection to server-side tool call patterns

aidr.title: Anthropic Memory tool multi-platform expansion
aidr.description: Agents can now persist and recall information across sessions on Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI — creates persistent data exposure vectors. AIDR Findings must detect sensitive data stored in agent memory

aidr.title: OpenAI MCP connector token refresh issue
aidr.description: MCP connector refreshing tokens on every tool call without session persistence — potential token leakage/replay attack surface

aidr.title: Microsoft Graph 17 new protocol types
aidr.description: Implicit flows, authorization code variants, client credentials, Kerberos, SSO, OBO — expand the attack surface for token-based attacks. Activity detection rules need updating

aidr.title: Microsoft Graph selfServiceSignUp resources
aidr.description: New signUpIdentity and signUpStatus resources for external ID tracking — potential for unauthorized external identity creation

aidr.title: Microsoft Graph SAS auth deprecation
aidr.description: Organizations must migrate Event Hubs change notification auth to Entra ID RBAC or lose notification delivery

aidr.title: Bedrock AgentCore Gateway enterprise integrations
aidr.description: Salesforce, Zoom, JIRA, Slack integrations — agents can now interact with sensitive enterprise systems. Activity monitoring needs to cover these tool invocations

aidr.title: Bedrock AgentCore Browser service
aidr.description: Playwright and BrowserUse integrations let agents browse autonomously — Data Lens must track websites and content accessed by browser-enabled agents

aidr.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine expansion
aidr.description: Code Execution, bidirectional streaming, and Memory Bank — agents gain persistent memory and code execution capabilities. Must monitor for data persistence and code injection risks

aidr.title: OpenAI platform log retention issue
aidr.description: Platform logs not deleted after 30 days as expected — data retention violation may affect compliance monitoring

aidr.title: Perplexity Agent API migration
aidr.description: /v1/agent endpoint with model behavior controls and research_loop_steps — new autonomous agent patterns to monitor

aidr.title: Microsoft Graph eDiscovery Beta APIs
aidr.description: Legal discovery workflows may expose sensitive data through new API surface

aidr.title: OpenAI ChatGPT pinned chats incident
aidr.description: Service disruption on Mar 21 — monitor for data accessibility issues

aidr.title: Anthropic structured outputs Vertex AI exclusion
aidr.description: Platform parity gap may affect detection consistency

aidr.title: Cursor v2.6 dynamic instrumentation logging
aidr.description: Captures runtime behavior data from developer sessions. Enterprise access controls tightened. MCP setup changes may affect endpoint security posture

aidr.title: Windsurf enterprise management features
aidr.description: MDM config support, Devin service key authentication, org-wide command lists — new capabilities for endpoint inventory and policy enforcement

aidr.title: Dia prompt injection safeguard acknowledgment
aidr.description: Official docs state some attacks can cause unexpected style or tone shifts without compromising system security — confirms prompt injection as recognized limitation in AI browsers

aidr.title: Cursor v2.6 automatic stale code cleanup
aidr.description: Modifies code without explicit user action. Plan file content feeds into autocomplete — potential context leakage between sessions

aidr.title: Windsurf GPT-5.4 Mini availability
aidr.description: New model at 1x credits for AI coding — monitor for data handling differences

aidr.title: Windsurf deprecated features
aidr.description: Windsurf Browser removed (Sep 2025), Knowledge Base removed, Legacy Mode removed — endpoint capabilities changing

aidr.title: Windsurf Apple M5 compatibility
aidr.description: New hardware support expands endpoint surface

aidr.title: Dia v1.23.0 GitHub Live Tab Groups
aidr.description: AI browser automatically managing developer GitHub workflows with automatic PR cleanup

aidr.title: Dia AI data retention policy
aidr.description: Retained only for security/compliance, never for training. Independent security assessments scope detailed

aidr.title: Perplexity MCP Server endpoint tools
aidr.description: Four named tools (search, ask, research, reason) — endpoint-level MCP integration expands local AI tool surface

aidr.title: Cursor documentation expansion
aidr.description: 200+ entries including Figma integration, test generation, legacy code modernization

aidr.title: Windsurf documentation update
aidr.description: Onboarding process and incompatibility warnings with other AI extensions

aidr.title: OpenAI Codex performance degradation
aidr.description: Multiple files causing severe degradation — may affect developer workflow reliability

aispm.title: Amazon Bedrock six new open-weight models
aispm.description: DeepSeek V3.2, MiniMax M2.1, GLM 4.7, GLM 4.7 Flash, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3 Coder Next — Inventory must map these new model deployments. Open-weight models may have different security profiles

aispm.title: Bedrock AgentCore new framework support
aispm.description: Google ADK and OpenAI Agents SDK now supported — Inventory must discover agents built with these frameworks. Expands the agent ecosystem needing posture assessment

aispm.title: Claude Opus 4 deprecation
aispm.description: Migrate before May 31, 2026 — AISPM Violations should flag Opus 4 usage as deprecated model risk

aispm.title: Vertex AI Claude 3.5 Haiku deprecation
aispm.description: Shutdown July 5, 2026 — Inventory must identify all Claude 3.5 Haiku deployments and flag for migration

aispm.title: Copilot Studio Claude Opus 4.6 model option
aispm.description: Content moderation sensitivity controls added — Inventory must track new model availability. Violations should verify moderation controls are properly configured

aispm.title: Microsoft Graph Lifecycle Workflows doubled
aispm.description: Limit raised 50→100 — organizations can deploy more automated identity workflows. Inventory must track expanded automation

aispm.title: Amazon Bedrock OpenAI-Compatible Projects API
aispm.description: New API surface on Mantle for model access needs inventory mapping

aispm.title: Bedrock AgentCore Cedar policy language
aispm.description: Organizations may define agent policies in Cedar — Violations should check for misconfigured or overly permissive agent policies

aispm.title: Anthropic Models API capabilities object
aispm.description: Enables programmatic model capability discovery — Inventory can leverage this for automated model capability mapping

aispm.title: Anthropic Files and Skills API GET endpoints
aispm.description: New API surfaces for listing files and skills — Inventory should map these resources. Violations should check for exposed/shared files

aispm.title: Perplexity MCP Server tools
aispm.description: perplexity_search, perplexity_ask, perplexity_research, perplexity_reason — new MCP tools to include in agent tool Inventory

aispm.title: Microsoft Graph Schema Extensions GA in US Government
aispm.description: Expanded government cloud capabilities may affect GovCloud compliance monitoring

aispm.title: Vertex AI Gemini 3.1 Pro and Flash models
aispm.description: New model releases require Inventory updates for organizations using Vertex AI

aispm.title: Power Apps version rollout
aispm.description: 3.26033/3.26034 deploying across regions — track version adoption for compliance

aispm.title: Perplexity model fallback chains
aispm.description: Up to 5 models in sequence — Inventory should capture fallback configurations

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot (M365)
details: Microsoft Graph API Changelog: New Bicep template support for user resource type (January 30, 2026), `activateWithScope` method for targeted workflow activation, `activationScope` resource with derived types. Source: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/

platforms.name: Azure AI Foundry
details: Azure AI Foundry Docs updated (Mar 19): New "Create apps with code" section with quickstarts, "Evaluate agentic workflows" and "Monitor your generative AI applications" added to Foundry Control Plane, Foundry IQ now includes "Connect knowledge base to agents", Microsoft Agent Framework now listed in resources. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-studio/

Azure OpenAI API Reference updated: Content Filtering now includes "jailbreak" and "protected material" categories, Parallel Tool Calls parameter documented (default: true), Managed Identity authentication options added, `max_completion_tokens` documented as replacement for `max_tokens`, Vision detail levels (low/high/auto) documented. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/reference

Azure OpenAI What's New: Minor enrichments to existing February 2026 and earlier entries (models available via Foundry, GPT-image-1.5 inpainting, transcription improvements). No new monthly sections. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/whats-new

platforms.name: Power Apps
details: New version releases: Studio/Mobile 3.26031 (first available Mar 2, worldwide Mar 23), 3.26024 (Feb 23 / Mar 16), 3.26022 (Feb 5 / Mar 3). Make.PowerApps.com 26032 (Mar 18 / Apr 1), 26023 (Feb 25 / Mar 11), 26015 (Feb 5 / Mar 2). Train 3.26023 cancelled due to Winter Olympics/Super Bowl/Lunar New Year. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-platform/released-versions/powerapps
Power Apps Docs: New "Vibe" coding experience (preview) at /vibe/overview, "Create a code app" option, "Plan designer" feature added. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/

platforms.name: Salesforce AgentForce
details: Salesforce Releases page: Spring '26 now described as "AI-driven innovation across every cloud and industry." New webinar scheduled 3/3/26 for ISV partners. Expanded on-demand webinars: Agentforce Voice innovations, Marketing Cloud Spring '26, Field Service, Platform Roadmap. New product demo collections including Slack and Revenue Management as featured products. Source: https://www.salesforce.com/releases/

platforms.name: ChatGPT Enterprise (OpenAI)
details: OpenAI Community Forum: gpt-realtime-1.5 is live in Realtime API (3,527 views); .NET libraries released for Agents SDK and ChatKit-style workflows; File upload problems with code interpreter in Assistants API; Signed URL file input logic broken; Codex consuming excessive credits during idle; Weekly usage limits exceeded without hitting 5-hour threshold; Codex data loss thread growing (25 replies, 986 views). Source: https://community.openai.com
OpenAI Status: Mar 13 — Responses API errors during background mode usage (resolved); Mar 13 — Conversation errors affecting logged-out users (resolved). Source: https://status.openai.com/history.rss
Python SDK (v2.29.0) and Node SDK (v6.32.0): No new releases since Mar 17. Source: https://github.com/openai/openai-python/releases

platforms.name: Claude Enterprise (Anthropic)
details: Anthropic News: No new announcements (latest: "What 81,000 people want from AI" from Mar 18). Source: https://www.anthropic.com/news
API Docs and Build with Claude: Fetch errors (Next.js rendering / 404). Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started

platforms.name: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
details: API Reference: 3 new API operations added (total now 40, up from 37). New `Evaluate` operation for programmatic agent evaluation. `GetWorkloadAccessTokenForJWT` and `GetWorkloadAccessTokenForUserId` now explicitly listed. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/APIReference/API_Operations.html

platforms.name: ServiceNow
details: Fetch errors — both docs pages require JavaScript rendering. Manual review recommended. Source: https://www.servicenow.com/docs/r/release-notes/family-release-notes.html

platforms.name: Cursor
details: **Composer 2 released (March 19, 2026)**: New model achieving "frontier-level coding performance." Token-based pricing: Standard $0.50/M input, $2.50/M output; Fast (default) $1.50/M input, $7.50/M output. Source: https://cursor.com/changelog

platforms.name: Windsurf
details: **v1.9577.43 (March 19, 2026)**: Mac x64 build fix. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
**v1.9577.42 (March 19, 2026)**: Various bug fixes and performance improvements. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog

Earlier builds now show enriched details: SKILL.md loading from `.windsurf/skills/` directory, POST_CASCADE_RESPONSE_WITH_TRANSCRIPT cascade hook, windsurf.cascade.readClaudeCodeConfig flag, VS Code 1.108 merge, model pinning feature. Source: https://windsurf.com/changelog
Docs updated: System requirements section added, Custom App Icons (beta) for Mac, onboarding process with import from VS Code/Cursor. Source: https://docs.windsurf.com

platforms.name: Perplexity
details: API Reference expanded: Tools section now documents three categories (Web Search, Fetch URL, Function Calls). New parameters: maximum output tokens, research loop steps 1-10, custom system instructions, language preference via ISO 639-1 codes. Streaming now specified as 14 distinct SSE event types with status indicators. Source: https://docs.perplexity.ai/api-reference

platforms.name: Dia Browser
details: **v1.23.0 (Issue #17, March 19, 2026)**: "From review to merge to what's next." Features: PR Status Celebrations (merge transition animations), Cleaned Closure Handling (automatic PR cleanup), Completed Work Preview (hover to preview finished PRs), Navigation Refinements. Source: https://diabrowser.com/release-notes

Security page: Prompt Injection Safeguards now documented as a distinct section with eight specific controls. Acknowledges some attacks can cause "unexpected style or tone shifts" without compromising system security. Source: https://diabrowser.com/security

aidr.description: computer_use_preview graduating to production — requires Activity monitoring expansion for screen-interaction agents

aidr.title: Cursor Automations
aidr.description: Always-on agents triggered by external events (Slack, GitHub, PagerDuty) — new agent Activity patterns to monitor

aidr.description: System-level skill injection via MDM — potential vector for enterprise-wide agent behavior modification, needs Data Lens coverage

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot (M365)
details: M365 Admin Center latest updates through November 2025, with Copilot Search Admin experience (June 2025) and AI Administrator role (January 2025) as notable recent additions
Graph API Changelog shows active development in identity governance, lifecycle workflows, and audit capabilities as of February 2026
Copilot extensibility documentation covers declarative agents, custom engine agents, plugins, connectors, and the new Microsoft Agent 365 (early access preview)
Sources checked:
https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/whats-new-in-preview?view=o365-worldwide

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
details: Extremely active development cadence with monthly feature releases
March 2026: Work IQ tools (Preview) for real-time work insights from M365
February 2026: Claude model integration (Sonnet 4.5 for Computer Use, Opus 4.6 for prompts), content moderation sensitivity controls
January 2026: Agent evaluations enhancements, Computer Use expansions with Cloud PC pooling, VS Code extension GA
November 2025: GPT-5 Chat GA, multi-agent orchestration, MCP server support, SharePoint metadata filters
Released versions page only shows August-September 2024 entries (may be incomplete)

platforms.name: Azure AI Foundry
details: Platform rebranded from "Azure AI Studio" to "Microsoft Foundry"
February 2026: GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 models released
December 2025: GPT-image-1.5, improved transcription/TTS/realtime-mini models
October 2025: GPT-4o-transcribe-diarize, PII detection filter, Realtime API SIP support
August-September 2025: GPT-5 family (GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-5-nano, GPT-5-chat, GPT-5-codex), Sora video generation (text-to-video, image-to-video, video-to-video)
API Reference: GA version 2024-10-21, Control Plane 2025-06-01, with monthly previews

platforms.name: Salesforce AgentForce
details: Spring '26 release is live, themed around "Agentic Enterprise" — combining human expertise with AI productivity
AgentForce positioned as "the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform" with Trust Layer architecture
Developer tools include: Agent API, Python SDK, Models API, Testing API, Mobile SDK (iOS/Android)
Agent Script provides hybrid natural language + programmatic expression authoring
Agentforce DX supports pro-code workflows via CLI and VS Code
Spring '26 spans Agentforce, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Field Service, Marketing Cloud, Commerce, and Analytics

platforms.name: Claude Enterprise (Anthropic)
details: Documentation has migrated from docs.anthropic.com to platform.claude.com (301 redirects)
Latest models: Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5, 2026) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17, 2026)
API surface organized into: Model capabilities, Tools (server-side & client-side), Tool infrastructure, Context management, Files/assets
Key capabilities: 1M token context, adaptive thinking, batch processing (50% savings), citations, computer use, MCP connector, agent skills
Beta features: Files API, Skills API
Available on direct API, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, Azure AI
